items.title: Cost of ANU's reputational damage 'in the order of $100 million'

items.title: ANU approved $250m cost-cutting plan without clear evidence, report finds

children.content: Australian National University's leadership approved a controversial $250 million cost-cutting program without a clear understanding of the problem it was trying to solve or the risks involved, a report has found.

items.title: Canberra Liberals say alleged violent threat was a 'misunderstanding'

items.title: Apprentice tradies aren't included in the minimum wage bump

children.content: Apprentice tradies aren't included in the new minimum wage bump.
New tradies sit under a different awards system, where an electrical apprentice can earn as little as $15.67 an hour if they've just left school early.
So, how does this impact the apprenticeship scheme, which is sold on the idea of being paid while you learn?

image.altText: Apprentices
